name: dify-mcp-server
description: A simple implementation of an MCP server for using dify workflows. It achieves the invocation of the Dify workflow by calling the tools of MCP.

env.name: DIFY_BASE_URL
env.description: The base URL for your Dify API.

env.name: DIFY_APP_SKS
env.description: Comma-separated list of your Dify App Secret Keys (SKs).
